name: Crockpot Red Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Red kidney beans, soaked overnight in water
2 Garlic cloves OR 1/4 teaspoon Garlic powder
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the soaked beans (except for the rice), ham hock, and seasonings to the crockpot.
2. Turn on high for 4 hours, then switch to low for 6 hours.
3. During the last 1 1/2 hours of cooking, add the rice.
4. Optionally, add white wine at any time during the final hour of cooking.
5. For a spicier flavor, add 1/8 teaspoon red pepper flakes before serving.
(Note: This recipe is based on contributions from Mary Mann and Sam Waring.)
